description_long: This is a freestanding shelving unit with a modern industrial design, featuring a sturdy metal frame and three open wooden shelves above a larger wooden work surface. The frame is constructed from rectangular metal tubing, providing both structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The shelves and work surface are made of wood with a rich, medium-brown finish and a visible horizontal grain pattern. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The lower section appears to be a solid wooden panel, possibly functioning as a shallow drawer or simply as a reinforced shelf. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the overall construction suggests durability and practicality for everyday use.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with a metal frame and three open wooden shelves above a larger wooden work surface. The design is open and accessible, with a rich brown wood finish and sturdy metal supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open wooden shelves and a large wooden work surface, all supported by a metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the angled metal supports, with the wooden surfaces stacked vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden shelves and work surface, with the metal frame visible on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same angled metal supports and the profile of the wooden shelves.
